moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated finale of Love Island 2026 is set to air live on ITV2 and ITVX, crowning this year's winning couple.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Who's taking home the £50k? The Love Island 2026 final is just days away! Tune in Monday.

angles.name: Last Couples Standing
angles.copy: After weeks of drama, declarations, and dumpings, the Love Island final is Monday. Which couple are you backing?

angles.name: Recap & Predict
angles.copy: It's been a wild ride! Get ready for the Love Island 2026 final on Monday. What's been your favourite moment this series?

moments.title: UK Festivals Live This Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival in Suffolk and Truck Festival in Oxfordshire are both in full swing this weekend, bringing live music to thousands.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Who's at Latitude or Truck Festival this weekend? Soak up the live music and summer vibes!

angles.name: Live Music Weekend
angles.copy: From Henham Park to Oxfordshire, UK festivals are buzzing! Catching any acts at Latitude or Truck this weekend?

moments.title: Together Again Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle, Cheshire, from Friday 24th to Sunday 26th July 2026, promising a celebration of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire's Calling
angles.copy: Together Again Festival starts tomorrow at Bolesworth Castle! Ready for a weekend of music, arts, and good times?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Grab your tickets, Together Again Festival kicks off Friday in Cheshire! What acts are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a small 4-day music festival in South Wales, is celebrating its 10th year this July with over 140 bands and DJs.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Happy 10th Birthday, Big Love Festival! South Wales is buzzing with 140+ bands & DJs this July.

angles.name: Local Love
angles.copy: South Wales is hosting the UK's friendliest small festival! Big Love is on this July. Who's heading down?

moments.title: UK Warm Weather & Drought Concerns
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing predominantly dry and very warm weather, particularly in central and southern England, with several water companies implementing temporary use bans due to drought conditions.

angles.name: Heatwave Continues
angles.copy: Another warm one for much of the UK! Southern England seeing mid-to-high 20s. Stay hydrated! ☀️

angles.name: Water Wise
angles.copy: With dry conditions continuing, remember to be mindful of water usage. Several areas have temporary use bans in place.

angles.name: Weekend Change
angles.copy: Enjoy the sunshine today and tomorrow! The Met Office forecasts more changeable weather, with rain, for the weekend.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Across UK
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are in full swing across England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland, with breaks typically running until late August or early September.

angles.name: Holiday Mode On
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Hope everyone across the UK is enjoying their summer holidays. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: From England to Scotland, summer holidays are here! Wishing all families a fantastic break.

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday Lil Uzi Vert
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Lil Uzi Vert, known for hits like 'XO Tour Llif3', turns 31 on July 31st.

angles.name: Uzi's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to the one and only Lil Uzi Vert on July 31st!

angles.name: Birthday Anthems
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Lil Uzi Vert's 31st birthday this month! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday Will Champion
moments.blurb: Will Champion, drummer for the iconic British band Coldplay, celebrates his 48th birthday on July 31st.

angles.name: Coldplay Drummer's Day
angles.copy: A huge happy 48th birthday to Coldplay's incredible drummer, Will Champion, on July 31st!

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating Will Champion's 48th on the 31st! What's your go-to Coldplay anthem?

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday Fatboy Slim
moments.blurb: Legendary English DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, born Quentin Leo Cook, turns 63 on July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Praise you! A massive happy 63rd birthday to the iconic Fatboy Slim on July 31st.

angles.name: Dance Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Fatboy Slim's birthday this month! What's your favourite track from the dance music pioneer?

moments.title: Happy 69th Birthday Daniel Ash
moments.blurb: English musician Daniel Ash, a founding member of Bauhaus, Tones on Tail, and Love and Rockets, turns 69 on July 31st.

angles.name: Goth Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 69th birthday to Daniel Ash, the legendary guitarist from Bauhaus and Love and Rockets, on July 31st!

angles.name: Alternative Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Daniel Ash's birthday this month. What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

moments.title: New Albums Incoming: Charli XCX, Shania Twain, The Strokes
moments.blurb: Friday sees new album releases from Charli XCX ('Music, Fashion, Film'), Shania Twain ('Little Miss Twain'), and The Strokes ('Reality Awaits').

angles.name: New Music Friday Eve
angles.copy: Get ready for new music! Tomorrow sees new albums from Charli XCX, Shania Twain, and The Strokes.

angles.name: Anticipated Drops
angles.copy: Which new album are you most excited for tomorrow? Charli XCX, Shania Twain or The Strokes?

moments.title: Recent Album Drops: Madonna, Deep Purple, The Rolling Stones
moments.blurb: Recent weeks have seen major album releases including Madonna's 'Confessions II' (July 3), Deep Purple's 'SPLAT!' (July 3), and The Rolling Stones' 'Foreign Tongues' (July 3).

angles.name: Still Spinning
angles.copy: Still got Madonna's 'Confessions II', Deep Purple's 'SPLAT!' or The Rolling Stones' 'Foreign Tongues' on repeat from earlier this month?

angles.name: Album Powerhouses
angles.copy: Three legendary acts, three new albums this month! What's your favourite recent release from Madonna, Deep Purple or The Rolling Stones?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Concludes
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded on July 19th with Spain winning the championship, Argentina as runners-up, and England securing third place.

angles.name: World Cup Aftermath
angles.copy: Spain are your 2026 World Cup champions! Congratulations to all the teams, especially England for finishing third. What a tournament!

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: The dust has settled on the FIFA World Cup 2026. What was your highlight from the tournament?

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 Review
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, held at Royal Birkdale, concluded on July 19th with Ryan Fox claiming the title.

angles.name: Golf Glory
angles.copy: Ryan Fox is your Champion Golfer of the Year! A fantastic 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale wraps up.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: Reflecting on The Open Championship 2026. What was your favourite shot or moment from the tournament?

moments.title: Youth Football Tournaments in UK
moments.blurb: The Manchester Cups for youth football are running this weekend (July 25-26), followed by the London Cup on August 1-2.

angles.name: Future Stars
angles.copy: Good luck to all young players competing in the Manchester Cups this weekend and the London Cup next week!

angles.name: UK Youth Sport
angles.copy: Manchester is hosting youth football this weekend, then London next! Great to see so much talent on display.
